title: Updated Hotbar
description: Updates the hotbar to give it a new appearance, while still looking like Minecraft.
body:
![About](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19d332cdab77737cd016fd7c1ae13efef260cbc7_0.webp)

**Updated Hotbar** gives the hotbar a translucent texture that is more simplified and spaced out, allowing for more visibility. The hotbar selector has been replaced with outlines that when overlayed on top, create the apperance of a larger slot texture. With axiom mod support.
